description.default: Build a foundation in accounting and financial administration skills to begin your accountancy career.

introParagraph.default: Start your AAT journey and gain the accounting fundamentals and business acumen to begin your accountancy career.

bodyCopy.default:
### Course overview

You will master day-to-day financial skills, sharpen your accounting skills, and learn double-entry bookkeeping, all while building confidence in using accounting software.

BPP supports your studies with:

- Pass rates up to 20% higher than the global average
- Experience training 2/3rds of all accountants in England and Wales
- Partnerships with 28 of the Top 30 Accountancy firms in the UK
